THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TINTERO, DIONISIO A. TINTERO, DESAMEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 450 SO VAN NESS AVE #1, SF, CA $4,000.00 RENT, $900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,900.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-22-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, THE EVICTION TO BE CANCELLED IF THE DEFTS PAY THE SUM OF $4000. ON OR BEFORE 7/22/97, PLTF TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT IF DEFTS MAKE THE $4000. AND PAY RENT ON TIME FOR 12 MOS. BEGIN 8/1/97 AND ATTY FEES $75. P/MO FOR 12 MOS.
